title: coreopsis davilae
intro: Coreopsis davilae, also known as Coreopsis, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Coreopsis davilae include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Coreopsis davilae are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
